zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger Wolcott於大約1425年出生在英國諾福爾可沃爾科特時，他的父親Sir John Walcott33歲，母親Matilda Cornwall38歲。他和Margaret Lloyd至少有6個兒子。他去世於1469年2月15日享年45歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roger Wolcott于大约1425年出生在英国諾福爾可沃爾科特时，他的父亲Sir John Walcott33岁，母亲Matilda Cornwall38岁。他和Margaret Lloyd至少有6个儿子。他去世于1469年2月15日享年45岁。

nameMeanings.name: Wolcott
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Devon and Surrey): habitational name from Wollacott in Thrushelton (Devon), named from the Old English personal name Wulfnōth + cot ‘cottage, hut, shelter’. This form of the surname is now rare in Britain.

History: Henry Wolcott (1578–1655), clothier, came from Tolland, Somerset, England, and settled in Windsor, CT, in 1636. His grandson Roger (1679–1767) was colonial governor of CT; his great-grandson Oliver (1726–1797) was a signer of the Declaration of Independence.

variants.name: Woolcock
meanings: English (Cornwall): probably a variant of   Wolcott  .

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger Wolcott was born about 1425, in Walcott, Norfolk, England, his father, Sir John Walcott, was 33 and his mother, Matilda Cornwall, was 38. He had at least 6 sons with Margaret Lloyd. He died on 15 February 1469, at the age of 45.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger Wolcott est né environ 1425, à Walcott, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Walcott, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Matilda Cornwall, avait 38 ans. Il a eu au moins 6 fils avec Margaret Lloyd. Il est décédé le 15 février 1469, à l’âge de 45 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger Wolcott um 1425 in Walcott, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Walcott 33 und seine Mutter Matilda Cornwall 38. Er hatte mit Margaret Lloyd mindestens 6 Söhne. Er starb am 15. Februar 1469 im Alter von 45 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger Wolcott è nato il circa 1425 nel Walcott, Norfolk, England, il suo padre, Sir John Walcott, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Matilda Cornwall, aveva 38 anni. Lui avuto almeno 6 figli con Margaret Lloyd. Morì il 15 febbraio 1469, all'età di 45 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger Wolcottが約1425年にイギリスノーフォルクワルコットで生まれた時，父Sir John Walcottは33歳，母Matilda Cornwallは38歳であった。彼はMargaret Lloydとの間に少なくとも6人の息子をもうけた。彼は1469年2月15日に45歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger Wolcott(이)가 대략 1425년 영국 노르폴크 월컷에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Walcott(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Matilda Cornwall(은)는 38세였다. 그는 Margaret Lloyd(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1469년 2월 15일 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger Wolcott nasceu aproximadamente 1425, em Walcott, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Walcott, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Matilda Cornwall, tinha 38 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 6 filhos com Margaret Lloyd. Ele faleceu em 15 de fevereiro de 1469, com 45 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger Wolcott родился около 1425 г. в местности валкотт, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Walcott было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Matilda Cornwall, 38. У него было по крайней мере 6 сыновей от Margaret Lloyd. Он умер 15 февраля 1469 г. в возрасте 45 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Roger Wolcott nació aproximadamente 1425, en Walcott, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Walcott, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Matilda Cornwall, tenía 38 años. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos con Margaret Lloyd. Murió el 15 de febrero de 1469, a la edad de 45 años.
